grant_title: New York Fund for Innovation in Research and Scientific Talent (NYFIRST)
eligible_applicant_type: Medical schools in New York State
project_area: Translational research in life sciences, focusing on recruitment/retention of exceptional researchers with commercialization potential
demographic_requirements: Principal Investigator must have a history of translational research, entrepreneurship (patents, commercialization), tenure-track or tenured, and must recruit/retain scientists from outside NYS or retain at least two full-time (or four part-time) scientists/doctoral students/post-doctoral fellows.
eligibility_summary: Only medical schools in New York State are eligible. The recruited researcher must have a history of translational research, demonstrate entrepreneurship, be tenure-track or tenured, and bring in scientists from outside NYS or retain at least two full-time (or four part-time) researchers. The research must have potential for significant life science economic development benefits in NYS.
